channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Mahrang Baloch, Prominent Baloch Activist, Sent To Life Imprisonment By Pakistan

media:content.media:description: The sentence has attracted widespread criticism.

item.description: Currently in custody, Mahrang Balcoh has been for years a vocal critic of the policies of the Pakistani government toward the Baloch People.
item.content:encoded: Currently in custody, Mahrang Balcoh has been for years a vocal critic of the policies of the Pakistani government toward the Baloch People.

item.title: 2 Children Found Dead In Car In France As Europe Sizzles Under Heatwave

media:content.media:description: Two children were found dead in a car in France on Monday.

item.description: The children, aged two and four, were found in their family car in a residential parking lot in Carpentras, where investigators said they believed the heatwave was the most likely reason for the deaths.
item.content:encoded: The children, aged two and four, were found in their family car in a residential parking lot in Carpentras, where investigators said they believed the heatwave was the most likely reason for the deaths.

item.title: Damage To Buildings Estimated At $1.38 Billion In Latest Israel-Lebanon War

media:content.media:description: Benjamin Netanyahu said on Sunday that Israeli forces would remain in southern Lebanon

item.description: Hezbollah drew Lebanon into the Middle East conflict on March 2 by launching rocket fire at Israel in support of its backer Iran.
item.content:encoded: Hezbollah drew Lebanon into the Middle East conflict on March 2 by launching rocket fire at Israel in support of its backer Iran.

item.title: Iran Says Strait Of Hormuz Closed, Tracking Data Shows Ships Crossing

media:content.media:description: Traffic on Saturday hit the highest levels since the start of the war.

item.description: As of 1530 GMT on Monday (late afternoon local time), the Kpler maritime tracking platform had already recorded 26 transits by commodity ships.
item.content:encoded: As of 1530 GMT on Monday (late afternoon local time), the Kpler maritime tracking platform had already recorded 26 transits by commodity ships.

item.title: US To Ensure Any Unfrozen Iranian Funds Won't Finance Terrorism: JD Vance

media:content.media:description: The talks were the first stage of a two-month negotiating period.

item.description: Iran has been subject to asset freezes and sweeping sanctions by the United States and other Western countries since its 1979 Islamic revolution that toppled the US-backed Shah, Mohammad Reza Pahlavi.
item.content:encoded: Iran has been subject to asset freezes and sweeping sanctions by the United States and other Western countries since its 1979 Islamic revolution that toppled the US-backed Shah, Mohammad Reza Pahlavi.

item.title: Analysis: 7 PMs In 10 Years - Understanding Britain's Political Crisis

media:content.media:description: Since 2016, the United Kingdom has witnessed an unusually high turnover of prime ministers.

item.description: A large majority in Parliament often suggests political stability. But Britain's recent experience shows that numbers alone do not guarantee strong public support.
item.content:encoded: A large majority in Parliament often suggests political stability. But Britain's recent experience shows that numbers alone do not guarantee strong public support.

item.title: 12 Indians Killed In Qatar Gas Plant Explosion, Says Embassy

media:content.media:description: A huge blast had rocked Qatar on Sunday.

item.description: The blast happened as workers were restarting operations, which were halted after an Iranian attack in March.
item.content:encoded: The blast happened as workers were restarting operations, which were halted after an Iranian attack in March.

item.title: Explained: How Next UK Prime Minister Will Be Chosen As Keir Starmer Resigns

media:content.media:description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said on Monday he would resign.

item.description: Any candidate wishing to replace Starmer would need to secure the support of 20 per cent of Labour members of parliament.
item.content:encoded: Any candidate wishing to replace Starmer would need to secure the support of 20 per cent of Labour members of parliament.

item.title: Full Text Of British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Resignation Speech

media:content.media:description: Keir Starmer resigned as UK Prime Minister.

item.description: Here is what British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said as he announced Monday he is stepping down as leader of the governing Labour Party.
item.content:encoded: Here is what British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said as he announced Monday he is stepping down as leader of the governing Labour Party.

item.title: X Recovers After Thousands Affected During Global Outage

media:content.media:description: The actual number of affected users may differ from what is shown.

item.description: The outage began around 9:00 am ET, peaking at over 25,000 issues being reported in the US before cooling to about 620 reports.
item.content:encoded: The outage began around 9:00 am ET, peaking at over 25,000 issues being reported in the US before cooling to about 620 reports.

item.title: Hormuz In Focus As Marco Rubio To Visit Gulf Countries From Tomorrow

media:content.media:description: The Rubio trip comes amid a broader flurry of Iran-related diplomacy.

item.description: Marco Rubio will travel Tuesday through Thursday to the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait and Bahrain, on a trip that will give the Trump administration a chance to sell its preliminary Iran accord directly to Gulf Arab allies.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio will travel Tuesday through Thursday to the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait and Bahrain, on a trip that will give the Trump administration a chance to sell its preliminary Iran accord directly to Gulf Arab allies.

item.title: US Lifts Oil Sanctions On Iran Till August 21 As Deal Talks Continue

media:content.media:description: All transactions that were previously prohibited will be authorised till August 21.

item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent cited Tehran's commitment in ongoing negotiations to "free and open transit" in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent cited Tehran's commitment in ongoing negotiations to "free and open transit" in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UK Lawyer Faces Up To Two Years In Prison For Cleaning Polluted River

media:content.media:description: The case has sparked backlash online.

item.description: The lawyer revealed that the restored stretch of the river has been thriving again and wildlife is returning.
item.content:encoded: The lawyer revealed that the restored stretch of the river has been thriving again and wildlife is returning.

item.title: 'Oracle, Maestro': Former US Federal Reserve Chair Alan Greenspan Dies

media:content.media:description: Alan Greenspan died Monday from complications of Parkinson's disease.

item.description: In his 18 and a half years at the helm of the Fed, Greenspan presided over a sustained era of American growth and prosperity, yet one that ended with devastating consequences in 2008, two years after he had left the central bank.
item.content:encoded: In his 18 and a half years at the helm of the Fed, Greenspan presided over a sustained era of American growth and prosperity, yet one that ended with devastating consequences in 2008, two years after he had left the central bank.

item.title: JD Vance Says US May Unfreeze Some Iranian Assets, Hints At Successful Deal

media:content.media:description: It's unclear when Vance will depart Switzerland.

item.description: JD Vance's comments came after he and Iran's parliamentary speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Monday wrapped up a lengthy round of initial talks aimed at solidifying a permanent end to the war between the countries.
item.content:encoded: JD Vance's comments came after he and Iran's parliamentary speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Monday wrapped up a lengthy round of initial talks aimed at solidifying a permanent end to the war between the countries.

item.title: 'Put Myself Forward': Andy Burnham Says He Will Run For UK Prime Minister

media:content.media:description: The former Manchester mayor could become leader without any formal contest.

item.description: Former health secretary Wes Streeting, who previously said he would join a leadership race, instead said he was backing Burnham
item.content:encoded: Former health secretary Wes Streeting, who previously said he would join a leadership race, instead said he was backing Burnham

item.title: Keir Starmer Quits As UK PM, Conceding To Pressure From Labour Party

media:content.media:description: The 63-year-old said he will remain in post until a new leader and PM is elected

item.description: Keir Starmer announces he will quit as UK PM, conceding to pressure from Labour Party
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1116607/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Keir Starmer announces he will quit as UK PM, conceding to pressure from Labour Party

item.title: Six Prime Ministers In 10 Years, 44 Days, One Lettuce: The UK's Queue
item.description: The UK has seen six prime ministers in ten years - Keir Starmer, the under-fire incumbent, preceeded by Liz Truss, Rishi Sunak, Boris Johnson, Theresa May, and David Cameron.
item.content:encoded: The UK has seen six prime ministers in ten years - Keir Starmer, the under-fire incumbent, preceeded by Liz Truss, Rishi Sunak, Boris Johnson, Theresa May, and David Cameron.

item.title: What UK PM Keir Starmer Said In His Resignation Speech: Top Quotes

media:content.media:description: UK PM Keir Starmer announced his resignation.

item.description: Keir Starmer today announced his resignation as British Prime Minister and the Leader of the Labour Party, setting out a timetable for his successor to be elected in the coming weeks and be in place by September.
item.content:encoded: Keir Starmer today announced his resignation as British Prime Minister and the Leader of the Labour Party, setting out a timetable for his successor to be elected in the coming weeks and be in place by September.

item.title: Why Keir Starmer Resigned: Behind UK's 6th Premature PM Exit In 10 Years

media:content.media:description: The Labour Party is yet to elect Starmer's successor

item.description: The Labour Party MPs had been discontent over a popularity decline since Starmer took office following a landslide victory in July 2024.
item.content:encoded: The Labour Party MPs had been discontent over a popularity decline since Starmer took office following a landslide victory in July 2024.
